# sudorohan.xyz

> Personal website and blog of Rohan Kiratsata, a Full Stack Engineer building micro SaaS products and indie hacking.

## About

This is the personal portfolio and blog of Rohan Kiratsata (sudorohan). The site contains articles about engineering, tech, products, and indie hacking.

## Author

- Name: Rohan Kiratsata
- Role: Full Stack Engineer
- Twitter: @sudorohan
- Email: heyarohan@icloud.com

## Sections

- /: Home page with introduction and projects
- /blog: Technical articles and thoughts
- /side-quest: Additional content and experiments

## Content

The blog covers topics including:
- Web development and programming
- Micro SaaS and product building
- Indie hacking experiences
- Technical tutorials and explanations

## Contact

For inquiries, reach out via Twitter @sudorohan or email heyarohan@icloud.com.
